content: Vortex deployment: mods extracted to a staging folder separate from game dir; deployment links them in. Methods: hardlink (same partition required, native perf, zero extra space, preferred), symlink (cross-drive, needs admin/dev mode on Win), elevated symlink, move/copy (fallback for FAT32/network). Manifest __vortex_deployment.json tracks every deployed file+source mod+hash+method+instanceID. Purge inverts using manifest, only deletes files it deployed. External change detection: Import/Drop/Restore.
